title: Workflow Test Fixture
description: Shape of tests/<name>.yaml files bundled with workflows. Run by POST /api/workflows/{id}/test. Mode 'ci' (default) requires mocks for every llm/llm_map step; 'real_llm' opts into real-LLM calls; 'snapshot' uses record/replay against captured responses.

inputs.description: Per-fixture input values, keyed by workflow input name.

mocks.description: Per-step canned responses. Required to cover ALL llm/llm_map steps when mode: ci. Keyed by step id.

expected_outputs.description: Per-output assertions, keyed by output name.

Assertion.description: Assertion against a workflow output. Combine multiple modes per output; all must pass.
